free_text: Comparative study of the fragments' mass and energy
characteristics in the spontaneous fission of 238Pu,
National Fund for Sci. Research, Brussels
The BR1 reactor at Mol, which provides
Sandwiched in between two surface-barrier detectors
and mounted in the centre of a vacuum chamber.

Double energy method (See Schmitt et al., 1966)
The conversion from pulse heights to pre- and post-
neutron mass and kinetic energies was carried out by
an iterative  procedure described in Schmitt et al.
The data were corrected for prompt neutron emission
